Team

Vidya Samadi

Assistant Professor
Vidya is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Agricultural Sciences at Clemson University, where she leads the Clemson Hydroinformatics Research Group. Vidya's background is in hydroinformatics, AI, and cyber-physical systems for water resource applications.

Vidya supervises the HydroQuantum research line at Clemson University.
GitHub Google Scholar

Mostafa Saberian

Ph.D. candidate
Mostafa is a Ph.D. candidate in Water Resources at Clemson Glenn Department of Civil Engineering focusing on hydroinformatics and data analytics tool development for water resources simulation.

Mostafa is lead author of HydroQuantum and contributor to the group’s quantum modeling workflow.
GitHub Google Scholar

Nima Zafarmomen

Ph.D. student
Nima is a Ph.D. student at Department of Agricultural Sciences. Nima works on hydroinformatics and data analytics tools for simulating water resources.

Nima is co-author of HydroQuantum and part of the current quantum hydrologic modeling team.
GitHub Google Scholar

Adarsha Neupane

Ph.D. student
Adarsha studies hydroinformatics and data analytics applications in precision agriculture, and is pursuing his Ph.D. at Department of Agricultural Sciences.

Adarsha is author of QuantumIrrigation and co-author of HydroQuantum.
GitHub Google Scholar

Krishna Panthi

M.S. graduate
Krishna is a M.S. graduate in Computer Science at Clemson University focusing on informatics and data engineering applications for water resources simulation.

Krishna is former contributor to HydroQuantum and co-author on the HydroQuantum publication.
GitHub Google Scholar
